name: PAX Rounded Multi-Tool
summary: The PAX Rounded Multi-Tool is custom-made for use with both the PAX Mini and PAX Plus devices.
description: The PAX Rounded Multi-Tool is custom-made for use with both the PAX Mini and PAX Plus devices. Its curved shape guarantees a secure placement in the oven without causing any damage. This versatile tool is perfect for packing and removing material from your device, and its accompanying keychain makes it easy to bring along on-the-go. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
